listing.title: 360B MELROSE STREET Toronto (Mimico), Ontario M8Z1G8
listing.description: Rare Permit-Issued Individual Building Lot Opportunity - 360 Melrose lot B. Listing Price Is For One Proposed 25 Ft X 125 Ft Lot Only; Full Two-Lot Package Also Available. Attention Builders, Investors, And End Users. Severance Approved With City-Assigned Address And Building Permit Issued For An Architecturally Distinct Modern/Contemporary Detached Home Designed By The Renowned Contempo Studios, Offering Over 2,100 Sq. Ft. Above Grade And Over 2,950 Sq. Ft. Including Basement. All Architectural Drawings, Working Drawings, And Construction Drawings Have Been Completed And Paid For. Permission To Remove Trees Has Been Granted. Buyer Can Start Construction Right Away With The Major Planning, Design, Severance, Tree, And Permit Work Already Completed. Existing Detached 4-Bedroom Bungalow With Basement Currently On Site, Offering Flexibility To Build A Shovel-Ready Project Now Or Hold And Build Later. Ideal For A Builder, Investor, Or End User Looking To Build A Custom Home In A Convenient Etobicoke Pocket, Minutes To Mimico, The Queensway, Sherway Gardens, Major Highways, Parks, Schools, Transit, And Everyday Amenities. Seller Is An HCRA/Tarion Licensed Builder And Can Build For The Purchaser. (43567036)
